aboutme.title: About Me
aboutme.content: Hardworking and passionate third-year student majoring in Artificial Intelligence, targeting an internship role in Artificial Intelligence Engineer or Software Engineer, eagar to apply knowledge in machine learning and deep learning to drive innovative and practical solutions to real life problems.

projects.title: Projects
projects.content: I have undertaken various hands-on experiences where I applied my knowledge in software development. These experiences demonstrate my ability to tackle complex problems, work effectively in teams, and deliver innovative solutions. They reflect my dedication to continuous learning and my passion for creating impactful and efficient solutions.

news.title: What am I doing lately...
news.content: I have been actively engaged in building and testing AI models, focusing on areas like image recognition, segmentation, reinforcement learning, and NLP. My recent projects have enhanced my practical experience and deepened my passion for developing innovative solutions to real-world problems. I am continuously seeking opportunities to apply my skills and knowledge in meaningful ways.
